授業目的: Course Subtitle: Fundamentals of Academic Writing英文欄参照/Refer to the following
到達目標: 英文欄参照/Refer to the following
授業方法: In principle, this class will be face-to-face; however, all class materials, tasks, and explanations will be posted in a Google Classroom dedicated to this class.The course format may include the following:- timed 5-minute writing- lecture on scheduled topic- class discussion on scheduled topic- person-to-person consultationsYou should have a stable wifi or internet connection at home to complete all out-of-class assignments.

第1回:
**The schedule below is an example of what the course might look like; however, the curriculum will depend on the interests, backgrounds, and needs of enrolled students, as determined by the needs analysis completed during the first class.**

【Startup Week】
 
"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Startup Week contents: Class overview, introductions, ice breakers, and discussion of "what is academic writing?"
第2回:
【Core Week 1】
"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Brainstorming topics – concept maps

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening / reading tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Textbook, Chapter 1.
第3回:
【Core Week 2】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》
 
Finding literature online

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class.
第4回:
【Core Week 3】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Creating annotated bibliographies

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Textbook, Chapter 2.
第5回:
【Core Week 4】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Developing an essay – grading rubric

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Textbook, Chapter 8
第6回:
【Core Week 5】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Writing tools and developing an essay conclusion

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Textbook, Chapter 3.
第7回:
【Core Week 6】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Citations and essay #1 consulting

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》

Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Textbook, Chapters 6-7;
Prepare annotated bibliography
第8回:
【Core Week 7】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Review essay #1; discuss ways to avoid plagiarism

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Textbook, Chapter 4; Prepare first hand-in assignment.
第9回:
【Core Week 8】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Common issues with style – APA vs. MLA

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class. Textbook, Chapter 5.
第10回:
【Core Week 9】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Introduce essay #2; formatting tables and figures

【Flex Hours】 "Online class (Task-oriented format) " /《20minutes》
Directed online listening tasks and your own personal online research - flex hours - to complete before the following class.
第11回:
【Core Week 10】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Common issues with punctuation
Complete all additional chapters of textbook.
第12回:
【Core Week 11】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》 

Commonly misused academic language & vocabulary
第13回:
【Core Week 12】

"Face-to-face class" /《90minutes》
 
Essay #2 consulting and reflection

学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: Students’ evaluation of this course will be conducted in class, during the period designated by the university, making use of the standard evaluation form.
